en_title: Star Wars: Zero Company Creators Talk Canon, Character Customization and More | IGN Live 2026
cn_title: 《星球大战 零号连队》开发者谈剧情与自定义角色
subtitle: 克隆人战争的暗流
opus_summary: 《星球大战 零号连队》总监Greg Foertsch和首席设计师James Brawley在IGN Live 2026上透露了这款回合制战术游戏的更多细节。游戏设定在克隆人战争末期，玩家扮演前共和国军官Hawks，可自定义种族和性别。角色有永久死亡机制，但结局融入正史。8月27日登陆PC、PS5和Xbox Series X/S。

paragraphs.en: Fresh off the debut of the big Official Story Trailer (as seen below), the Force was felt at IGN Live Sunday with a panel for Star Wars: Zero Company featuring Director Greg Foertsch and Lead Designer James Brawley.
paragraphs.cn: 在大型官方故事预告片（如下所示）首播后，IGN Live 周日的《星球大战 零号连队》座谈小组感受到了原力，总监 Greg Foertsch 和首席设计师 James Brawley 出席了活动。

paragraphs.en: The upcoming single-player turn-based tactics game is set in the twilight of the Clone Wars and Foertsch elaborated how you play against (and within) the backdrop of the Clone Wars, not so much directly immersed in them. "There's so many things going on. Lots of different backroom dealing, lots of politics at play. While the Clone Wars is happening, there's this other war happening beneath the war."
paragraphs.cn: 这款即将推出的单人回合制战术游戏设定在克隆人战争的末期，Foertsch 详细阐述了玩家如何在克隆人战争的背景下作战（并置身其中），而非直接沉浸其中。他说：「有太多事情在发生。大量幕后交易，许多政治博弈。在克隆人战争进行的同时，还有另一场战争在战争之下进行。」

paragraphs.en: Zero Company contains XCOM-style permadeath for characters, even though it is considered a canonical story. Said Foertsch, "All the stuff that happens in the middle, your experience will be different from mine, but in the end where it all wraps up, that's where it funnels into the Star Wars canon," even as there might be variations on who lives and dies around you along the way.
paragraphs.cn: 《零号连队》包含类似《XCOM》的角色永久死亡机制，尽管它被视为正史故事。Foertsch 说：「中间发生的一切，你的体验会与我的不同，但在最终收尾时，所有线索都会汇入《星球大战》正史。」尽管沿途谁生谁死可能有所不同。

paragraphs.en: Brawley noted that while "the tactical missions themselves are the bread and butter of a lot of the gameplay and where all off the combat happens," he was also excited for players to experience The Den. As he described it, The Den is "a place where you and your operators are operating between missions. You'll have the opportunity to not only talk to the different members of the team and see how they're doing and if they're hoping you'll help them take care of something, but also take care of a lot of the management tasks. You'll be able to buy items from the black market. You can choose to modify your character's load outs - what weapons and utility items they're using and then customize and level up their skills as you choose to."
paragraphs.cn: Brawley 指出，虽然「战术任务本身是大部分游戏玩法的核心，也是所有战斗发生的地方」，但他也很期待玩家体验「巢穴」。他描述道，「巢穴」是「你和你的特工在任务之间运作的地方。你不仅有机会与团队的不同成员交谈，了解他们的状况，以及他们是否希望你帮忙处理某事，还可以处理许多管理任务。你可以在黑市购买物品。你可以选择修改角色的装备——他们使用的武器和实用物品——然后根据自己的选择自定义和升级他们的技能。」

paragraphs.en: Following that, you then move to the Galaxy map, which is where "you'll send your guys out on non-combat missions that help them gather intelligence and new resources."
paragraphs.cn: 之后，你会进入银河地图，在那里「你可以派遣你的队员执行非战斗任务，帮助他们收集情报和新资源。」

paragraphs.en: At the conclusion of those tasks, the cycle concludes, with Brawley explaining that's when you "accept and select a mission, choose your squad members, and see the sequence where you depart the Den."
paragraphs.cn: 这些任务完成后，循环结束，Brawley 解释说，这时你可以「接受并选择任务，挑选你的小队成员，然后看到你离开巢穴的序列。」

paragraphs.en: As for the team you assemble, Brawley noted that Star Wars: Zero Company contains "A cast of bespoke characters but the player can also create as many custom characters as they want and they can perform the same level of combat interactions as the other characters."
paragraphs.cn: 关于你组建的团队，Brawley 指出，《星球大战 零号连队》包含「一批定制角色，但玩家也可以创建任意数量的自定义角色，并且他们可以与其他角色进行同等水平的战斗互动。」

paragraphs.en: Teamwork is integral because the game contains what Brawley calls the Bond System, "where actions and combat can improve relationships between two of the characters on the team. That's really the backbone of how our characters progress. As the relationships develop, they gain more and more focus points to spend on leveling up their skills."
paragraphs.cn: 团队合作至关重要，因为游戏包含 Brawley 所称的「羁绊系统」，「行动和战斗可以改善团队中两个角色之间的关系。这确实是角色成长的核心。随着关系的发展，他们会获得越来越多的专注点数，用于提升技能。」

paragraphs.en: In the game, you play as former Republic office Hawks, whose default is a human male, but Foertsch noted, "Hawks can be anything you want Hawks to be. You can make Hawks a Twi'lek or a Zabrak, a male, a female... It should be however you want to express yourself as a player"
paragraphs.cn: 在游戏中，你扮演前共和国军官 Hawks，默认是人类男性，但 Foertsch 指出：「Hawks 可以是你想要的任何样子。你可以让 Hawks 成为提列克人或扎布拉克人，男性或女性……它应该能让你以任何方式表达自己作为玩家的个性。」

paragraphs.en: The trailer revealed Anakin Skywalker will show up in the game, but it also showed a glimpse of an unknown figure holding a red lightsaber. Given we know Zero Company is set near the end of the Clone Wars, Foertsch and Brawley were asked whether Anakin would be considered good or perhaps more Dark Sided already - or perhaps you meet him both before and after? Replied Foertsch, "You'll have to play it to find out!"
paragraphs.cn: 预告片显示安纳金·天行者将出现在游戏中，但也闪现了一个手持红色光剑的未知人物。鉴于我们知道《零号连队》设定在克隆人战争接近尾声时，Foertsch 和 Brawley 被问及安纳金是善是恶，或者是否已经更偏向黑暗面——或者你会在之前和之后都遇到他？Foertsch 回答说：「你得玩了才知道！」

paragraphs.en: Star Wars: Zero Company will be available on PC, PlayStation 5 (PS5), and Xbox Series X/S on August 27.
paragraphs.cn: 《星球大战 零号连队》将于8月27日登陆PC、PlayStation 5（PS5）和Xbox Series X/S。

paragraphs.en: Be sure to keep up with everything going on at IGN Live 2026 . You can check the full schedule to see what else is coming up across games, movies, TV, streaming, and more.
paragraphs.cn: 请务必关注IGN Live 2026的所有动态。你可以查看完整日程，了解游戏、电影、电视、流媒体等更多内容。
